title: Christmas Snowman Fridge Sticker Decoration – Large Removable Snowman Decal for Fridge, Freezer, Windows & Holiday Home Décor
features: Festive Snowman Fridge Décor – Add cheerful Christmas charm to your kitchen with this adorable snowman fridge sticker, perfect for holiday home decorating.
Easy to Apply & Remove – Simply apply to clean, smooth surfaces such as fridge doors, freezers, windows or appliances. Removes cleanly without residue.
Create a Fun Snowman Character – Arrange the individual pieces to build a cute snowman face and accessories on your fridge or window.
Large Decorative Size – Measures approx. 45cm x 30cm, big enough to create an eye-catching festive feature in your kitchen or dining area.
Lightweight Plastic Material – Made from plastic. Keep out of reach of young children due to small parts.
description: Product description Sold: Single Approx size: 45cm x 30cm / 17.7 in x 11.8 in Material: Plastic Safety Warning Keep away from naked flame
